title: tater - hierarchical
description: Ontology-driven annotation using single-select and multi-select hierarchical label widgets.
instructions:
## Leaf nodes only

Select only terminal nodes in the ontology (e.g. a specific breed).
Search shows matched terms and their ancestors.

## Any level

Allows selecting intermediate nodes (e.g. a species group like "Sporting").
Search uses context mode — matched terms plus siblings and children — useful for browsing broader categories.

widget.label: Breed
widget.description: Select a single breed or type.

widget.label: Breeds - Multiselect
widget.description: Select one or more breeds. Search shows matched terms and their ancestors.

widget.label: Breed
widget.description: Select a breed or any intermediate category.

widget.label: Breeds - Multiselect
widget.description: Select one or more breeds or intermediate categories. Search uses context mode — shows siblings and children of matched terms.
